questions.q: What social media platform is reportedly rolling out unskippable ads lasting up to 90 seconds for TV users, causing user frustration?
questions.correctText: YouTube is rolling out unskippable long ads, up to 90 seconds, to TV users.

questions.q: According to a recent report, what percentage of white-collar professionals are reportedly refusing to adopt AI tools despite employer mandates?
questions.correctText: A staggering 80% of white-collar professionals are reportedly refusing to adopt AI tools.

questions.q: Which major tech company has begun removing its AI assistant, Copilot, from built-in Windows 11 apps like Notepad and Snipping Tool?
questions.correctText: Microsoft has begun removing Copilot from Windows 11 apps such as Notepad and Snipping Tool.

questions.q: What government agency recently issued a warning to U.S. internet users to reboot their routers due to attackers targeting home networks?
questions.correctText: The National Security Agency (NSA) issued a warning to reboot internet routers.

questions.q: How was the FBI recently able to extract a suspect's deleted Signal messages from an iPhone, even after the app was uninstalled?
options: From the iPhone's push notification database
By compelling Signal to provide data
questions.correctText: The FBI was able to forensically extract copies of incoming Signal messages from an iPhone's push notification database.
